description: Curated benchmark issue set: 25 real GitHub issues from popular Python open-source repos spanning bug fixes, feature additions, refactoring, and test writing. Used to compare single-agent vs Bernstein multi-agent orchestration.
methodology: Issues selected from SWE-Bench Lite (https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-bench) and related popular Python repos. Each issue represents a self-contained coding task with a clear acceptance criterion (tests pass). Categories reflect typical developer work distribution: 32% bug fix, 28% feature, 20% refactor, 20% test writing.
selection_criteria: Closed issue with a merged fix (ground truth available)
Reproducible via a failing test that was added as part of the fix
Self-contained: fix does not require external services or data
Representative of the four task categories
Drawn from active, well-maintained Python open-source projects

issues.title: Optimization: QuerySet.distinct() subquery results in extra JOIN when combining with annotate()
issues.description: QuerySet.filter(pk__in=qs.distinct()) generates an unnecessary JOIN. Fix requires recognising when the inner queryset is already distinct and omitting the redundant join.

issues.title: MigrationAutodetector crashes with AlterField + AlterUniqueTogether in same migration
issues.description: When ManyToManyField changes coincide with AlterUniqueTogether, MigrationAutodetector raises an AttributeError. Fix requires reordering dependency resolution in the autodetector.

issues.title: PreparedRequest.copy() does not deep-copy the request body
issues.description: PreparedRequest.copy() performs a shallow copy, so mutating the body of the copy affects the original. Fix adds copy.copy() for the body attribute.

issues.title: POST with chunked transfer encoding fails when content-type includes boundary
issues.description: Chunked POST requests with multipart content-type raise a ValueError due to conflicting header handling. Fix adjusts the header merge logic for chunked bodies.

issues.title: Autouse fixture with function scope silently escalated to session scope in some parametrize combinations
issues.description: Under specific parametrize configurations an autouse function-scoped fixture is executed once per session instead of once per test. Fix corrects scope resolution during fixture collection.

issues.title: Colorbar tick labels incorrect with LogNorm when vmin/vmax span less than one decade
issues.description: When colorbar uses LogNorm with a range less than one decade, tick labels are duplicated or missing. Fix adjusts tick locator fallback behaviour for narrow log ranges.

issues.title: SimpleImputer strategy='most_frequent' raises error on column with all NaN values
issues.description: SimpleImputer with strategy='most_frequent' raises scipy.stats.mode error when a column is entirely NaN. Fix adds a guard and falls back to the fill_value.

issues.title: simplify() gives inconsistent results for equivalent trigonometric expressions
issues.description: simplify(sin(x)**2 + cos(x)**2) correctly returns 1, but simplify(cos(x)**2 + sin(x)**2) does not simplify in certain assumptions contexts. Fix normalises argument order before matching.

issues.title: Add Prefetch.to_attr support for reverse ForeignKey with filtering
issues.description: Prefetch() currently ignores custom querysets on reverse FK relations when to_attr is used. Feature adds queryset application to the prefetch cache when to_attr is specified.

issues.title: Support nesting blueprints with url_prefix inheritance
issues.description: Flask does not support registering a Blueprint on another Blueprint. Feature adds Blueprint.register_blueprint() and propagates url_prefix, error handlers, and before/after request hooks.

issues.title: Add sample_weight support to VotingClassifier and VotingRegressor
issues.description: VotingClassifier.fit() does not pass sample_weight to sub-estimators that support it. Feature adds sample_weight propagation with a check_estimator-compatible implementation.

issues.title: Add spectral flux density equivalency to units module
issues.description: astropy.units lacks a built-in equivalency for converting between spectral flux density units (Jy, erg/cm²/s/Hz). Feature adds spectral_density() equivalency following the pattern of existing equivalencies.

issues.title: Add Matrix.columnspace() for sparse matrices
issues.description: SparseMatrix does not implement columnspace(), falling back to the slow dense path. Feature adds a sparse-native columnspace() using LU decomposition.

issues.title: Add set_xlabel/set_ylabel/set_zlabel shortcuts to Axes3D
issues.description: Axes3D requires ax.set_xlabel() to be called differently from 2D axes due to missing delegation. Feature aligns the 3D axis label API with the 2D API.

issues.title: Add Dataset.drop_indexes() to complement Dataset.set_index()
issues.description: Dataset has no method to remove multi-indexes and convert them back to data variables. Feature adds drop_indexes() as the inverse of set_index().

issues.title: Refactor QuerySet.union() to correctly handle RangeField combinators
issues.description: QuerySet.union() uses a shared combinator path that doesn't account for the special SQL generated by RangeField lookups. Refactor separates the combinator path from range-specific handling.

issues.title: Refactor warnings plugin to support custom warning category filters
issues.description: The warnings plugin hardcodes certain warning categories instead of routing through a configurable filter chain. Refactor extracts the filter logic into a pluggable interface.

issues.title: Refactor FeatureUnion to propagate feature names from transformers
issues.description: FeatureUnion.get_feature_names_out() returns generic names instead of delegating to sub-transformers. Refactor delegates feature name retrieval to each transformer and prefixes with transformer name.

issues.title: Refactor Time class to lazily compute internal representation
issues.description: Time.__init__() eagerly converts to the internal (jd1, jd2) representation on construction, incurring unnecessary compute for conversion-heavy use cases. Refactor defers conversion to first access.

issues.title: Refactor Symbol assumptions to use lazy evaluation
issues.description: Symbol assumptions are eagerly propagated at creation time, causing performance issues when creating large numbers of symbols. Refactor defers assumption inference to query time.

issues.title: Add regression tests for deletion of proxy model instances
issues.description: Proxy model deletion via the parent model queryset has no regression test coverage. Add tests covering: direct delete, cascade delete via FK, and bulk delete.

issues.title: Add tests for session-level auth hook propagation to prepared requests
issues.description: Session.prepare_request() applies auth hooks but there are no tests verifying the hook is invoked and the result used. Add unit tests with a mock auth hook.

issues.title: Add tests for -W flag interaction with filterwarnings ini option
issues.description: The interaction between the -W CLI flag and filterwarnings in pytest.ini is undocumented and untested. Add parametrized tests covering precedence and override scenarios.

issues.title: Add tests for constrained_layout with subfigures and nested gridspecs
issues.description: constrained_layout has no tests for the subfigure path or nested GridSpec combinations. Add image comparison tests for both cases.

issues.title: Add tests for FITS table column type coercion during read
issues.description: FITS table reading silently coerces column types (e.g. float64 → float32) without test coverage. Add regression tests for type preservation and explicit coercion paths.
